summary: Tested P0-P4 bug fixes for The Doggy Company platform. All features verified working: Session persistence, Dashboard hero section with pet card, Login redirect to homepage, Checkout pet name validation, and Mobile cart responsiveness.

details: Login returns valid JWT token and user data
/api/auth/me correctly returns user data with valid token
/api/auth/me correctly rejects invalid/missing tokens (401)
Session persists across page navigations (tested: homepage -> dashboard -> cakes -> dashboard)
AuthContext uses refs to prevent duplicate fetches
Only clears auth on explicit 401 errors, not network errors

features_verified.feature: P1 - Dashboard 'A System That Remembers' Hero Section
details: Hero section displays 'A System That Remembers' title with gradient text
Pet card shows pet name (Mojo), breed (Indie), and Pet Soul percentage (57%)
Pet Pass Member badge with Active status displayed
Quick stats show Points (20), Pets (9), Orders (4)
Pet Soul Progress bar with percentage displayed
Login.jsx line 28 redirects to '/' not '/dashboard'
Verified via Playwright: after login, URL is https://companion-care-3.preview.emergentagent.com/
Users can explore naturally from homepage
Checkout.jsx lines 137-144: isValidPetName() validates pet name doesn't contain '@'
Checkout.jsx lines 874-876: Validates pet name before saving to localStorage
Email addresses will not be saved as pet names
Pet Details section shows 'Required for Cake' badge
Quick Select from Your Pets feature works for logged-in users
CartSidebar.jsx uses Sheet component with responsive width
Cart sidebar opens full width (390px) on mobile viewport
Cart items, quantity controls, and checkout button all visible
Continue Shopping button works correctly

critical_code_review_comments: AuthContext.jsx: Good use of refs (fetchingRef, mountedRef) to prevent race conditions and duplicate fetches
AuthContext.jsx: Correctly only clears auth on 401 errors, preserves session on network errors
Checkout.jsx: Pet name validation properly prevents email addresses from being saved as pet names
MemberDashboard.jsx: Pet photo handling improved with fallback icon
CartSidebar.jsx: Responsive design using Sheet component with w-full sm:max-w-lg
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_session_dashboard_checkout.py - Created comprehensive test suite for session, dashboard, and checkout features
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0-P4 bug fixes verified. Session persistence working with improved error handling in AuthContext. Dashboard hero section displays pet card with name, breed, and Pet Soul percentage. Login redirects to homepage. Checkout validates pet name to prevent email addresses. Mobile cart is responsive.

Auth API: POST /api/auth/login - Returns access_token and user data
GET /api/auth/me - Returns user data with valid token, 401 without
Pets API: GET /api/pets/my-pets - Returns pets with name, breed, overall_score
Mira API: POST /api/mira/context - Returns personalized context for authenticated users

screenshots_taken: .screenshots/03_dashboard.png - Dashboard with 'A System That Remembers' hero
.screenshots/10_email_as_pet_name.png - Checkout with email entered as pet name
